MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-17-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT SHERRI WHEELER'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT IS DENIED. THE COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES MALICIOUS CONDUCT WITHIN THE MEANING OF CC 3294(C)(1) IN LIGHT OF ALLEGATIONS THAT DEFENDANTS PLACED THE CORD KNOWING THAT OTHERS HAD BEEN PREVIOUSLY INJURED BY THAT CONDUCT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER.) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. (302/PJB)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT SHERRI WHEELER'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT is denied. The complaint sufficiently alleges malicious conduct within the meaning of CC 3294(c)(1) in light of allegations that Defendants placed the cord knowing that others had been previously injured by that conduct. (Prevailing party to prepare a proposed order.) Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
